requirement_topic.en: Energy labeling and minimum energy performance for household refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 电冰箱节能标签与最小能效要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電冰箱節能標籤與最小能效要求

summary.en: Indonesia requires household refrigerators imported for sale to carry an ESDM energy label with compliant efficiency class and minimum-energy-performance controls before market placement, with label language and declaration prepared for the Indonesian market. Exporter sales materials and shipping labels should match the approved model and class used for customs and post-entry control.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚要求进口销售的家用电冰箱在上市前使用符合要求的ESDM节能标签和最小能效控制，标签语言、型号与标签等级需面向印尼市场。出口商的销售材料和运输标签应与监管核验的型号和等级保持一致。
summary.zht: 印尼要求進口銷售的家用電冰箱在上市前使用符合要求的ESDM節能標籤與最小能效控制，標籤語言、型號與標籤等級需面向印尼市場。出口商的銷售材料與運輸標籤應與監管核驗的型號和等級保持一致。

standards_or_laws: Peraturan Menteri ESDM on household electrical appliance energy labelling and import-side verification framework
Peraturan Menteri ESDM on the star-rating (SKEM) labelling mechanism

summary.en: China generally relies on domestic appliance efficiency labeling systems and family-specific data under GB-based standards for product sales inside China. Chinese labels are not automatically accepted in Indonesian customs and shelf entry checks when model class, unit size class, and market declaration differ from the declared Indonesia file.
summary.zh: 中国通常按GB体系和机型族标准使用国内节能标识体系并用于内销。若型号类别、容积等级、市场声明与印尼申报文件存在差异，中国标签通常不能直接用于印尼海关和入市核验。
summary.zht: 中國通常按GB體系與型號族標準使用國內節能標識體系並用於國內銷售。若型號類別、容積等級、 市場聲明與印尼申報文件存在差異，中國標籤通常不能直接用於印尼海關和入市核驗。

standards_or_laws: China energy-labeling and efficiency disclosure framework for household appliances
GB 12021 series references for refrigerator energy performance limits

gap.en: Exporters must align model-level energy class, net volume brackets, voltage assumptions, and energy declaration language to the Indonesia submission file. Reusing China-only labels or translated labels without Indonesian model approval often causes desk review delays at port intake.
gap.zh: 出口商必须将机型级别、净容积档位、电压假设与能耗声明语言对齐到印尼申报文件。若沿用中国本地标签或仅做翻译而无印尼型号批准，通常会在港口入库审核中延迟放行。
gap.zht: 出口商必須將機型級別、淨容積檔位、電壓假設與能耗聲明語言對齊到印尼申報文件。若沿用中國本地標籤或僅做翻譯而無印尼型號批准，通常會在港口入庫審核中延遲放行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for refrigerators within scope of ESDM energy-labelling requirements and market entry controls.
mandatory_status.cn: China labels support domestic market sales but do not replace Indonesian energy-label submission requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Validate final SKEM star class and label artwork against the exact import model, and keep copies in the export file. Do not assume Chinese domestic labels are accepted as Indonesian energy evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请将最终的SKEM星级和标签图样与具体进口型号逐一核对，并保存在出口文件包。不要将中国国内标签视作印尼能效合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請將最終的SKEM星級和標籤圖樣與具體進口型號逐一核對，並保存在出口文件包。不應將中國國內標籤視作印尼能效合規證據。
